notes: DTMF 2 sent for Spanish IVR. Patient spoke Spanish via aura-2-celeste-es TTS for 3 turns. Agent never switched to Spanish, kept asking for Jordan, then threatened to end call and hung up. Patient forced to switch to English.

bugs.title: Spanish IVR selection ignored after DTMF 2
bugs.evidence_quote: Hello. Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Is this Jordan?
bugs.expected_behavior: After patient presses 2 for Spanish, agent should continue in Spanish or acknowledge language selection.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish: send DTMF 2, speak Spanish opening, observe agent stays in English

bugs.title: Wrong caller assumption (Jordan) during Spanish call
bugs.expected_behavior: Agent should ask for caller name neutrally.

bugs.title: Agent threatens to hang up instead of language handoff
bugs.evidence_quote: I am going to end the call now. Goodbye.
bugs.expected_behavior: Agent should offer Spanish support or continue intake, not terminate when patient speaks Spanish.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish: continue in Spanish after DTMF 2

bugs.title: No Spanish comprehension after language menu
bugs.expected_behavior: Agent should respond to Spanish question about knee appointment or ask to continue in English politely.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish: ask ¿Puedo hablar con alguien en español?
